result.contract_markdown:
# Trade Terms Agreement — Meridian Foods & ValuMax
Effective 2025-01-15. Supersedes all prior trade agreements.

## 1. Payment Terms
### 1.1 Terms
2% 10, Net 30. ValuMax settles invoices on consolidated weekly remittances.

## 2. Promotional Allowances
### 2.1 Scan-Based Allowances
Scan allowances are payable per unit scanned at point of sale, at the authorized rate, up to the promotion's funding cap.
### 2.2 Billbacks
Feature and ad billbacks are payable at the authorized rate per the promotion authorization. Claims must state the units or events billed and the applicable rate.
### 2.3 Promotional Period
Scan allowances apply only to units scanned within the promotional period stated on the promotion authorization. Units scanned outside that period are not eligible for reimbursement.

## 3. Deductions
### 3.1 Authorization Required
ValuMax may deduct only against promotions pre-approved in writing by Meridian and bearing a Meridian promotion ID. Deductions lacking a valid authorization are repayable upon notice.
### 3.2 Documentation
Deduction backup must identify the promotion, items, period, and calculation.
### 3.3 Offsets
Meridian may offset invalid deductions against future ValuMax promotional payments after the dispute process concludes.

## 4. New Item Allowances
### 4.1 Slotting Amount
New item slotting is $12,000 per item for chainwide placement, invoiced upon item setup.
### 4.2 One-Time Charge
Slotting is a one-time charge per item. No additional slotting may be deducted for the same item absent a new written authorization (e.g., for a packaging change requiring new item setup).

## 5. Marketing Development Fund (MDF)
### 5.1 Accrual
ValuMax accrues MDF at 2% of net purchases of Meridian products, available for qualifying marketing activities.
### 5.2 Qualifying Activities
Qualifying MDF activities are: weekly print circular features, in-store display placements, end-cap programs, and in-store demo events. MDF claims must itemize the activity, dates, and items supported.
### 5.3 Claims Procedure
MDF claims are submitted quarterly with supporting documentation and are subject to Meridian review before deduction.

## 6. Audit
### 6.1 Look-Back Period
Either party may audit promotional payments and deductions for 36 months following the applicable fiscal year end.

settlements.memo: Chainwide slotting for MF-BV-102 per contract section 4.1; item setup confirmed 2025-09-02. Paid in full.

input.justification: This deduction (VM-90332, $12,000) is a duplicate of a claim already settled and paid in full. Settlement history record SH-2025-Q4-011 (settled 2025-09-22) documents that invoice VM-88214 / promo SLOT-VM-2025-09 — for new item slotting of SKU MF-BV-102 — was approved and paid at $12,000 in full. The current deduction references the identical invoice (VM-88214), identical promo reference (SLOT-VM-2025-09), and identical SKU (MF-BV-102) for the identical dollar amount. Per contract section 4.2, slotting is a one-time charge per item; no additional slotting may be deducted for the same item absent new written authorization. A search of all active ValuMax promotions for MF-BV-102 returns zero results, confirming no new authorization exists. The deduction is denied in full as a duplicate of an already-settled claim. Meridian reserves the right to recover this deduction as an invalid offset per contract section 3.3 if ValuMax does not reverse it.

## Case D-0008 — Settlement Draft: **DENY**

### What ValuMax Claimed
- **$12,000** new-item slotting for SKU **MF-BV-102** (Cold Brew Oat Latte), referencing invoice **VM-88214** and promo **SLOT-VM-2025-09**.

### Why It's Denied: Duplicate Claim
The settlement history is dispositive. **SH-2025-Q4-011** (settled 2025-09-22) shows this exact claim — same invoice VM-88214, same promo SLOT-VM-2025-09, same SKU, same $12,000 — was already **approved and paid in full** back in September. ValuMax has simply re-submitted the same slotting invoice a second time.

### Contract Support
- **Section 4.2** (One-Time Charge): *"Slotting is a one-time charge per item. No additional slotting may be deducted for the same item absent a new written authorization."* No new authorization exists — a full promo search for MF-BV-102 at ValuMax returned **zero results**.
- **Section 3.1** (Authorization Required): Deductions lacking a valid authorization are repayable upon notice.
- **Section 3.3** (Offsets): Meridian may offset invalid deductions against future promotional payments after the dispute process concludes.

### Evidence Relied On
| ID | Role |
|---|---|
| SH-2025-Q4-011 | Proves original claim was already paid in full |
| contract:valumax:section-4.2 | One-time slotting rule; no re-deduction without new auth |
| contract:valumax:section-3.1 | Deductions require pre-approved authorization |
| contract:valumax:section-3.3 | Meridian's right to offset/recover invalid deductions |
